욥기 8:2.content: “How long will you speak these things? Shall the words of your mouth be a mighty wind?

욥기 8:3.content: Does God pervert justice? Or does the Almighty pervert righteousness?

욥기 8:4.content: If your children have sinned against him, he has delivered them into the hand of their disobedience.

욥기 8:5.content: If you want to seek God diligently, make your supplication to the Almighty.

욥기 8:6.content: If you were pure and upright, surely now he would awaken for you, and make the habitation of your righteousness prosperous.

욥기 8:7.content: Though your beginning was small, yet your latter end would greatly increase.

욥기 8:8.content: “Please inquire of past generations. Find out about the learning of their fathers.

욥기 8:9.content: (For we are but of yesterday, and know nothing, because our days on earth are a shadow.)

욥기 8:10.content: Shall they not teach you, tell you, and utter words out of their heart?

욥기 8:11.content: “Can the papyrus grow up without mire? Can the rushes grow without water?

욥기 8:12.content: While it is yet in its greenness, not cut down, it withers before any other reed.

욥기 8:13.content: So are the paths of all who forget God. The hope of the godless man will perish,

욥기 8:14.content: Whose confidence will break apart, Whose trust is a spider’s web.

욥기 8:15.content: He will lean on his house, but it will not stand. He will cling to it, but it will not endure.

욥기 8:16.content: He is green before the sun. His shoots go out along his garden.

욥기 8:17.content: His roots are wrapped around the rock pile. He sees the place of stones.

욥기 8:18.content: If he is destroyed from his place, then it will deny him, saying, ‘I have not seen you.’

욥기 8:19.content: Behold, this is the joy of his way: out of the earth, others will spring.

욥기 8:20.content: “Behold, God will not cast away a blameless man, neither will he uphold the evildoers.

욥기 8:21.content: He will still fill your mouth with laughter, your lips with shouting.

욥기 8:22.content: Those who hate you will be clothed with shame. The tent of the wicked will be no more.”
